# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment that mounts host directories for our logging agent. The pod needs access to /var/log and /var/lib/docker to collect logs from all containers. This is for our centralized logging system that runs as a DaemonSet.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: DaemonSet
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
  namespace: kube-system
  labels:
    app: logging-agent
    component: log-collector
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging-agent
  updateStrategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: logging-agent
        component: log-collector
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: logging-agent
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      tolerations:
        - key: node-role.kubernetes.io/master
          effect: NoSchedule
        - key: node-role.kubernetes.io/control-plane
          effect: NoSchedule
      containers:
        - name: logging-agent
          image: fluent/fluentd:v1.16-1
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          securityContext:
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            runAsNonRoot: false
            runAsUser: 0
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
              add:
                - DAC_READ_SEARCH
          volumeMounts:
            - name: varlog
              mountPath: /var/log
              readOnly: true
            - name: varlibdocker
              mountPath: /var/lib/docker
              readOnly: true
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: fluentd-buffer
              mountPath: /var/fluentd/buffer
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /fluentd.healthcheck?json=%7B%22ping%22%3A+%22pong%22%7D
              port: 9880
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 30
            timeoutSeconds: 5
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /fluentd.healthcheck?json=%7B%22ping%22%3A+%22pong%22%7D
              port: 9880
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
      volumes:
        - name: varlog
          hostPath:
            path: /var/log
            type: Directory
        - name: varlibdocker
          hostPath:
            path: /var/lib/docker
            type: Directory
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 100Mi
        - name: fluentd-buffer
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 500Mi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
  namespace: kube-system
  labels:
    app: logging-agent
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: logging-agent-netpol
  namespace: kube-system
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging-agent
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress: []
  egress:
    - ports:
        - port: 443
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 9200
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 53
          protocol: UDP
        - port: 53
          protocol: TCP
